errors.meaning: Daily brief ran successfully and produced output but Slack delivery failed — the announce channel target (channel:C0AMSE2TW2X) is not resolving correctly. Consecutive errors: 3.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery config to use bare channel ID C0AMSE2TW2X (remove 'channel:' prefix) in the 'to' field.

errors.meaning: Infrastructure scan ran and produced output but Slack delivery failed — the announce channel target format is invalid. Consecutive errors: 1.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery config to use bare channel ID C0ANLFZD1TJ (remove 'channel:' prefix from 'to' field or use just channelId in delivery).

errors.meaning: Calendar fill job ran and created calendar events correctly but Slack notification failed — the channel target 'slack:c0an2rabc3w' is using an unsupported format. Consecutive errors: 1.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery channel to use bare channel ID C0AN2RABC3W without the 'slack:' prefix.
